glosses.de: ein Spiel bestreiten; um etw. kämpfen
glosses.tr: maç yapmak; bir şey için yarışmak
glosses.hi: मैच खेलना; के लिए प्रतिस्पर्धा करना
glosses.ro: a disputa (un meci); a concura pentru

sentences.target: On dispute un match ce soir.

translations.fr: On dispute un match ce soir.
translations.de: Wir spielen heute Abend ein Spiel.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite jogamos uma partida.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi thi đấu một trận.
translations.hi: आज रात हम एक मैच खेल रहे हैं.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; syntactic subject of the clause (colloquially ‘we’), triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular; here means ‘to play/contest’ (a sporting event), agreeing with ‘On’.
Indefinite article introducing a singular count noun as direct object.
Common noun; direct object of ‘dispute’, denotes a sporting game.
Demonstrative determiner forming a temporal noun phrase.
Temporal noun; with ‘ce’ forms an adverbial time expression (‘this evening/tonight’).

sentences.target: La prof le dispute après la classe.
sentences.reading: /la pʁɔf lə dis.pyt apʁɛ la klas/

translations.fr: La prof le dispute après la classe.
translations.ipa: /la pʁɔf lə dis.pyt apʁɛ la klas/
translations.en: The teacher scolds him after class.
translations.es: La profesora lo regaña después de clase.
translations.de: Die Lehrerin schimpft mit ihm nach dem Unterricht.
translations.it: La professoressa lo rimprovera dopo la lezione.
translations.pt: A professora o repreende depois da aula.
translations.vi: Cô giáo mắng cậu ấy sau giờ học.
translations.nl: De lerares berispt hem na de les.
translations.hu: A tanárnő leszidja őt az óra után.
translations.hi: क्लास के बाद टीचर उसे डाँटती है.
translations.el: Η καθηγήτρια τον μαλώνει μετά το μάθημα.
translations.nb: Læreren skjenner på ham etter timen.
translations.sv: Läraren skäller ut honom efter lektionen.
translations.da: Læreren skælder ham ud efter timen.
translations.ja: 授業の後で先生が彼を叱ります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (feminine singular) introducing the subject noun.
Common noun (colloquial for ‘professeur’); head of the subject noun phrase.
Clitic 3rd person masculine direct object pronoun placed before the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular; here means ‘to scold/tell off’ a person.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article with ‘classe’ inside the prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘après’.

sentences.target: Je veux disputer la finale demain.

translations.fr: Je veux disputer la finale demain.
translations.en: I want to compete in the final tomorrow.
translations.de: Ich möchte morgen das Finale bestreiten.
translations.ru: Я хочу завтра участвовать в финале.
translations.pt: Eu quero disputar a final amanhã.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn thi đấu ở trận chung kết vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: أريد أن أشارك في النهائي غدًا.
translations.nl: Ik wil morgen in de finale spelen.
translations.uk: Я хочу завтра змагатися у фіналі.
translations.hi: मैं कल फाइनल में खेलना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να αγωνιστώ στον τελικό αύριο.
translations.nb: Jeg vil konkurrere i finalen i morgen.
translations.id: Saya ingin bertanding di final besok.
translations.sv: Jag vill tävla i finalen i morgon.
translations.ro: Vreau să concurez în finală mâine.
translations.da: Jeg vil konkurrere i finalen i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日決勝に出場したいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 1st singular; controls an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement (xcomp) of ‘veux’; here ‘to contest/play’ (a final).
Definite article introducing the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of ‘disputer’ (the championship/deciding match).
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.

sentences.target: Elles disputent une course ce matin.

translations.fr: Elles disputent une course ce matin.
translations.en: They are competing in a race this morning.
translations.es: Ellas compiten en una carrera esta mañana.
translations.de: Sie nehmen heute Morgen an einem Rennen teil.
translations.zh-Hans: 她们今天早上参加比赛。
translations.ru: Они участвуют в забеге этим утром.
translations.pt: Elas competem em uma corrida esta manhã.
translations.vi: Sáng nay họ thi đấu trong một cuộc đua.
translations.nl: Zij doen vanmorgen mee aan een wedstrijd.
translations.uk: Вони змагаються в забігу сьогодні вранці.
translations.hi: आज सुबह वे एक दौड़ में भाग ले रही हैं.
translations.pl: One rywalizują dziś rano w biegu.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί αγωνίζονται σε έναν αγώνα.
translations.nb: De konkurrerer i et løp i dag tidlig.
translations.id: Pagi ini mereka berlomba dalam sebuah balapan.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen tävlar de i ett lopp.
translations.ro: Ele concurează într-o cursă în această dimineață.
translations.da: De konkurrerer i et løb her til morgen.
translations.ja: 彼女たちは今朝レースに出場します。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person feminine plural subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd plural; here means ‘to compete in/run’ (a race), agreeing with ‘Elles’.
Indefinite article (feminine) introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun; direct object of ‘disputent’.
Demonstrative determiner forming a temporal noun phrase.
Temporal noun used adverbially with ‘ce’ (‘this morning’).
